title: RED CROSS SHELTER OPENINGS - 211info
text: AMERICAN RED CROSS WEBSITE RED CROSS SHELTER OPENINGS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides shelters for those needing to evacuate their homes. May provide food and water for those staying at the shelter. Locator Eligibility: -Individuals evacuating due to a natural disaster or emergency, pets allowed but may need to be housed in a different location with support from animal welfare groups Hours: Varies by site - (800) 733-2767 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (800) 733-2767 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to search for available shelters on the map. Website shows what to bring to a shelter and what services are available there. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Disaster Related Shelter Services Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - BLOOD SERVICES INTERNATIONAL AFFAIRS - INTERNATIONAL DISASTER RESPONSE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
